description: Chibi beat-em-up brawler character, base movement/action set: idle, walk, punch-combo, kick, hurt, knockdown, get-up, death.

states.name: idle
states.action: Standing idle loop: subtle breathing, a tiny blink, and a very small body bob; essentially the same pose and facing in every frame. Proportion-appropriate motion for chibi build: exaggerated bouncy motion, big head stays readable, minimal limb detail.
requirements: Character faces right in a clean side profile in every frame.
Keep the pose, silhouette, and palette essentially identical between frames aside from the subtle idle motion.
Feet stay planted.
Proportion-appropriate motion for chibi build: exaggerated bouncy motion, big head stays readable, minimal limb detail.

states.name: walk
states.action: Rightward walk cycle: alternating stride through legs and arms only, viewed from the side. Proportion-appropriate motion for chibi build: exaggerated bouncy motion, big head stays readable, minimal limb detail.
requirements: The row must unmistakably face and travel right, viewed from the side.
The stride must visibly alternate across the frames instead of repeating one static pose.
Do not draw floor shadows, dust, or motion trails.
Proportion-appropriate motion for chibi build: exaggerated bouncy motion, big head stays readable, minimal limb detail.

states.name: punch-combo
states.action: Punch combo: a chained sequence of jabs through windup, strikes, and recovery, through pose and an attached impact effect only. Proportion-appropriate motion for chibi build: exaggerated bouncy motion, big head stays readable, minimal limb detail.
requirements: The row must unmistakably face right, viewed from the side.
Any impact flash must be physically attached to or overlapping the character silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached impact stars, motion lines, or afterimages.
Proportion-appropriate motion for chibi build: exaggerated bouncy motion, big head stays readable, minimal limb detail.

states.name: kick
states.action: Kick strike: windup, extension, impact, and recovery through pose and an attached impact effect only. Proportion-appropriate motion for chibi build: exaggerated bouncy motion, big head stays readable, minimal limb detail.
requirements: The row must unmistakably face right, viewed from the side.
Any impact flash must be physically attached to or overlapping the character silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached impact stars, motion lines, or afterimages.
Proportion-appropriate motion for chibi build: exaggerated bouncy motion, big head stays readable, minimal limb detail.

states.name: hurt
states.action: Hit reaction: impact flinch, recoil, and recovery. Proportion-appropriate motion for chibi build: exaggerated bouncy motion, big head stays readable, minimal limb detail.
requirements: Show impact through pose only: flinch, recoil, brief off-balance lean, then recovery.
Any attached impact flash must overlap the silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached stars, floating symbols, or separate impact bursts.
Proportion-appropriate motion for chibi build: exaggerated bouncy motion, big head stays readable, minimal limb detail.

states.name: knockdown
states.action: Knockdown impact: stagger, fall, and a held final sprawled pose on the ground. Proportion-appropriate motion for chibi build: exaggerated bouncy motion, big head stays readable, minimal limb detail.
requirements: The final frame must be a stable, held sprawled pose suitable as an animation end state, not a mid-motion frame.
Any attached impact effect must overlap the silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached dust clouds, floating symbols, or ground cracks outside the silhouette.
Proportion-appropriate motion for chibi build: exaggerated bouncy motion, big head stays readable, minimal limb detail.

states.name: get-up
states.action: Recovery get-up: push off the ground, rise through a crouch, and return to a standing stance. Proportion-appropriate motion for chibi build: exaggerated bouncy motion, big head stays readable, minimal limb detail.
requirements: Start from a grounded pose and end standing.
Do not draw ground shadows, dust, or impact marks.
Proportion-appropriate motion for chibi build: exaggerated bouncy motion, big head stays readable, minimal limb detail.

states.name: death
states.action: Death sequence: impact, stagger, collapse, and a held final defeated pose. Not a loop; the last frame is the resting end state. Proportion-appropriate motion for chibi build: exaggerated bouncy motion, big head stays readable, minimal limb detail.
requirements: The final frame must be a stable, held defeated pose suitable as an animation end state, not a mid-motion frame.
Any attached dust or impact effect must overlap the silhouette and stay inside the same frame slot.
Do not draw detached dust clouds, floating symbols, or ground cracks outside the silhouette.
Proportion-appropriate motion for chibi build: exaggerated bouncy motion, big head stays readable, minimal limb detail.
